content: Fixed critical multi-tenant data isolation vulnerability in backend/crates/reporting/src/service.rs. All 16 query methods that accepted `_tenant_id` now properly bind it into SQL with parameterized queries. Also fixed SQL injection in `get_approval_analytics` (replaced string-interpolated dates with parameterized binds). Key patterns: dynamic queries with format! need param_count starting at 2 (not 1) after inserting tenant_id=$1; static queries get tenant_id=$1 added to WHERE; methods with existing params shift them up by 1. Test helpers (seed_user, seed_vendor, seed_invoice) updated to accept explicit tenant_id. Added test_tenant_isolation_dashboard test. Syntax verified valid.
summary: Fixed tenant_id not bound in reporting SQL queries - all 16 methods now filter by tenant
